card_description: George Turner is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick realizes that all his novels (1952-1976) are actually chapters of a single "Ur-Geschicht" (Original Story) that maps the "Koinos Kosmos" (Shared Reality) breaking through the "Idios Kosmoi" (Private Delusions)."
